facts.statement: The Mariana Trench's deepest point (Challenger Deep) is 12,000 meters deep
The Mariana Trench is 5,000 km long
The pressure at the bottom of the Mariana Trench is 500 times atmospheric pressure
The temperature at the bottom of the Mariana Trench is 0°C
The Mariana Trench is 200 km wide
